name: Eagle Loan
description_short: Eagle Loan Company is an Ohio-based branch lender offering personal loans through physical locations, with an Apply Here option for in-person or online applications.
description_long:
Eagle Loan Company is a regional personal loan company operating physical branch locations across Ohio. The Norwood, OH branch—one of multiple locations indicated by the site's branch-based URL structure—is located at 4600 Smith Rd Suite C-8 and staffed by a named branch manager, suggesting a locally accountable, relationship-oriented lending model rather than a purely digital operation.

Eagle Loan Company offers personal loans accessible through branch visits or an online application portal. The company's website lists standard loan-related resources and FAQs, and the branch structure implies applicants may need to visit or contact a local office to complete their loan process. No specific loan amounts, APRs, or product types are disclosed on the branch page.

What distinguishes Eagle Loan Company is its brick-and-mortar presence with named, local branch managers—a model common among regional consumer finance companies that serve borrowers who prefer face-to-face service or may not qualify at online-only lenders. Multiple branch locations across Ohio suggest an established regional footprint rather than a single-location operation.

Honestly, the public-facing website provides very limited product detail. Prospective borrowers will not find loan ranges, interest rates, eligibility requirements, or fee disclosures without contacting a branch directly. Eagle Loan's Monday–Friday, 9–5 operating hours offer no weekend access, which may be inconvenient for working borrowers. Consumers should call or visit a branch to understand actual terms before applying.
address: 4600 Smith Rd Suite C-8, Norwood, OH 45212

company_info.headquarters: 4600 Smith Rd Suite C-8, Norwood, OH 45212

pros: Physical branch locations with named, accountable local managers
Multiple Ohio locations based on branch URL structure
In-person application option for borrowers who prefer face-to-face service
Online 'Apply Here' functionality available alongside branch visits
Established regional presence suggesting operational stability
cons: No loan amounts, APRs, or fee disclosures visible on the website — must contact branch for terms
Branch hours are Monday–Friday 9–5 only — no weekend availability
Geographic limitation: Ohio-only branch network, not available to borrowers outside the region
Limited transparency on eligibility criteria or credit requirements online
best_for: Ohio residents who prefer in-person loan applications over fully digital processes
Borrowers who want a local point of contact and relationship-based lending
Consumers who have been turned down by online lenders and want a regional alternative
diagnosis: Eagle Loan Company suits Ohio residents who prefer dealing with a local, branch-based lender over a faceless online platform. The main caveat is near-total lack of public rate and product transparency — borrowers must contact a branch to learn what they'd actually qualify for.
services: Online loan applications via 'Apply Here' portal
Branch-based loan servicing and account management
